text: Here, I feel a strange sense of in-betweenness. There is the stark modernity and emptiness of the corridor and room, glass and metal reflecting sterile lighting. The world feels paused, expectant, like something important either just happened or is about to begin. But then, I step into the second scene and am drawn to the colors and words—an exhibit dedicated to 'R+D', responsive and dynamic, where thought and reflection are put on display. The written words about waiting in a car, longing for community, echo my own anticipation. I sense a quiet excitement beneath the surface, as if the space is inviting me not just to observe but to question how we connect and innovate. I am both an outsider and suddenly, through the ideas here, part of something larger.
